results.rendered_html: sauhṛdya n. = sauhṛda Zuneigung, Freundschaft: sauhṛdye sthitāḥ  MBH. 15,893 . paryavasthitāḥ 895  (sauhṛde  ed. Bomb. ).  Spr. (II) 6378 . suhṛdbhirapi sauhṛdyaṃ śaṭhe śāṭhyaṃ samācaret 7026 . sauhṛdyaṃ kar (saha)  HIT. 24,12 . yathā sauhṛdyameva tayoḥ kāritaṃ mayā 65,21 .
